name: ask-sam
description: Sam Parr's operational second brain — 876 episodes (793 My First Million + 83 MoneyWise) distilled into 18 interactive skills, 134 framework articles, 38 people profiles, and entity intelligence. 10 decision skills, 4 tutors, 2 intelligence skills, 1 sequential evaluator, and 1 utility — all grounded in real quotes from Sam, Shaan Puri, and 500+ guests.
